nasb.text: Rehum the commander and Shimshai the scribe wrote a letter against Jerusalem to King Artaxerxes, as follows—

esv.text: Rehum the commander and Shimshai the scribe wrote a letter against Jerusalem to Artaxerxes the king as follows:

cnv.text: 省長利宏和祕書伸帥寫奏本給亞達薛西王，控告耶路撒冷。奏文如下：

ccb.text: 利宏省长和伸帅书记也写了奏本给亚达薛西王，控告耶路撒冷人，内容如下：
